howItWorks.title: From Analysis to Deployment in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: We follow a proven methodology to clone your business operations with AI — fast, reliable, and tailored to your workflow.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: We map your entire company, identify automatable processes, and design the optimal AI agent architecture for each department.

cloning.title: Cloning
cloning.description: We create specialized AI agents for each role and department — trained on your data, your tone, and your business rules.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: We integrate with your existing tools, run validation tests, train your team, and launch your AI workforce into production.

solution.title: AI Agents That Run Your Business 24/7
solution.subtitle: Deploy intelligent AI agents that handle the work of entire departments — without hiring, training, or managing more people.

cta.headline: Every Business is
cta.subtitle: We design tailored AI agent solutions for your specific workflows, team structure, and business goals — no off-the-shelf packages.
cta.noPricingNote: No contracts. No pricing tables. Just a conversation about your business.

departments.title: Departments You Can Clone Today
departments.subtitle: Each department comes pre-built with specialized AI agents trained for their specific role — ready to deploy in days, not months.

sales.title: Sales
sales.expandedDescription: Our Sales AI agents handle the full pipeline — from first contact to closed deal. They qualify leads, schedule meetings, send follow-ups, and update your CRM in real time.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.tagline: Create and distribute content at scale
marketing.expandedDescription: Marketing AI agents produce blog posts, social media content, email campaigns, and ad copy — all aligned with your brand voice and optimized for engagement.

support.title: Customer Support
support.expandedDescription: Support AI agents answer customer questions instantly, book appointments, handle complaints, and escalate complex issues — in any language, around the clock.

operations.title: Operations
operations.expandedDescription: Operations AI agents automate internal workflows, generate reports, monitor KPIs, and keep all departments synchronized — eliminating bottlenecks and manual overhead.

faq.title: Common Questions About Business Cloning
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting your AI transformation.

q1.question: How long does implementation take?
q1.answer: Most businesses are fully operational with their AI agent workforce within 2-4 weeks. The timeline depends on the complexity of your workflows and the number of departments. We start with a pilot in one department so you see results quickly, then scale from there.

q2.question: Which departments can be automated?
q2.answer: Any department with repetitive, rule-based tasks is a strong candidate: Sales (lead qualification, follow-ups), Marketing (content creation, scheduling), Customer Support (inquiries, booking), and Operations (data entry, reporting, coordination). We analyze your specific workflows to identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities first.

q3.question: Is it safe for sensitive data?
q3.answer: Yes. Security is built into our architecture from day one. We use enterprise-grade encryption, role-based access controls, and data residency options. Our AI agents operate within your existing security perimeter and comply with GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC 2 requirements. Your data is never used to train third-party models.

q4.question: How does it integrate with our current tools?
q4.answer: Our AI agents connect natively with 100+ business tools including Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Zapier, and more. If you use a custom internal system, we build a dedicated integration. No migration, no disruption — your team keeps working the same way.

q5.question: Do we need a technical team?
q5.answer: No. We handle the entire implementation, configuration, and maintenance of your AI agent workforce. Your team does not need any technical knowledge. We provide training for end-users and ongoing support. Our goal is that your people focus on strategy and creativity, not on managing software.

q6.question: What happens to current employees?
q6.answer: AI agents handle the repetitive and low-value tasks, freeing your team to focus on high-impact, creative, and strategic work. Our clients consistently report improved employee satisfaction because people stop doing tedious work. No one gets replaced — everyone gets upgraded.
